title: Control Panel Cabinet Playbook
description: Run a control panel cabinet meeting: VP brings direct reports weekly; each covers their specific domain from a shared control panel of metrics and risks; decisions and cross-team asks are logged. Leadership operating rhythm, not a status dump.

mindset.principle: A cabinet works when every seat brings their portfolio and the room sees one board. Fire drills are not a rhythm.

mistakes.label: Only meet when something is broken
mistakes.cost: No equity; surprises in every exec review

mistakes.label: VP talks entire hour
mistakes.cost: Directs check out; panel is theater

mistakes.label: Nobody owns a section of the panel
Read numbers with no asks or decisions

cabinet_roles.label: VP or equivalent holds time and decision rights
Each direct owns a control panel slice
Decisions, risks, cross-asks logged same day

decision_branches.situation: Need weekly leadership rhythm under a VP

agent_signal.use_when: VP and directs need a weekly control panel / cabinet operating rhythm. Metrics and risks per owner. Not only fire drills. Sibling pattern to PIE for leadership layer.
decision_criteria: Each direct owns a panel slice.
Decision and risk log every week.
Chair enforces time; no single monologue hour.
agent_signal.operator_context: Field pattern: control panel meetings with VP and directs, cabinet-style. Pair with PIE (eng+support) and floor task forces (IC layer).
agent_signal.not_for: Generic all-hands. Not a substitute for board governance.
trigger_phrases: VP and directs need a weekly control panel / cabinet operating rhythm. Metrics a
Need playbook: Control Panel Cabinet Playbook
